Examples.Title: Create an Activity
Examples.Description: Creates a manual activity for an athlete, requires activity:write scope.
Examples.Code:
### Create an Activity
# @name createActivity
POST {{host}}/activities
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 201
# Description: The activity's detailed representation.
# Content-Type: application/json
# default
# Description: Unexpected error.
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Get Activity
Examples.Description:
Returns the given activity that is owned by the authenticated athlete. Requires activity:read for Everyone and Followers activities. Requires activity:read_all for Only Me activities.

We strongly encourage you to display the appropriate attribution that identifies Garmin as the data source and the device name in your application. Please see example below from VeloViewer (that provides an attribution for a Garmin Forerunner device).

![Attribution](/images/device-attribution-image.png)
Examples.Code:
### Get Activity
# @name getActivityById
GET {{host}}/activities/{{id}}?include_all_efforts={{include_all_efforts}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: The activity's detailed representation.
# Content-Type: application/json
# default
# Description: Unexpected error.
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: List Activity Comments
Examples.Description: Returns the comments on the given activity. Requires activity:read for Everyone and Followers activities. Requires activity:read_all for Only Me activities.
Examples.Code:
### List Activity Comments
# @name getCommentsByActivityId
GET {{host}}/activities/{{id}}/comments?page={{page}}&per_page=30&page_size=30&after_cursor={{after_cursor}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Comments.
# Content-Type: application/json
# default
# Description: Unexpected error.
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: List Activity Kudoers
Examples.Description: Returns the athletes who kudoed an activity identified by an identifier. Requires activity:read for Everyone and Followers activities. Requires activity:read_all for Only Me activities.
Examples.Code:
### List Activity Kudoers
# @name getKudoersByActivityId
GET {{host}}/activities/{{id}}/kudos?page={{page}}&per_page=30
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Comments.
# Content-Type: application/json
# default
# Description: Unexpected error.
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: List Activity Laps
Examples.Description: Returns the laps of an activity identified by an identifier. Requires activity:read for Everyone and Followers activities. Requires activity:read_all for Only Me activities.
Examples.Code:
### List Activity Laps
# @name getLapsByActivityId
GET {{host}}/activities/{{id}}/laps
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Activity Laps.
# Content-Type: application/json
# default
# Description: Unexpected error.
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: List Athlete Activities
Examples.Description: Returns the activities of an athlete for a specific identifier. Requires activity:read. Only Me activities will be filtered out unless requested by a token with activity:read_all.
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using Strava;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Update Activity
Examples.Description: Updates the given activity that is owned by the authenticated athlete. Requires activity:write. Also requires activity:read_all in order to update Only Me activities
Examples.Code:
### Update Activity
# @name updateActivityById
PUT {{host}}/activities/{{id}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "commute": true,
  "trainer": true,
  "hide_from_home": true,
  "description": "string",
  "name": "string",
  "type": "AlpineSki",
  "sport_type": "AlpineSki",
  "gear_id": "string"
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: The activity's detailed representation.
# Content-Type: application/json
# default
# Description: Unexpected error.
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Get Authenticated Athlete
Examples.Description: Returns the currently authenticated athlete. Tokens with profile:read_all scope will receive a detailed athlete representation; all others will receive a summary representation.
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using Strava;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Get Zones
Examples.Description: Returns the the authenticated athlete's heart rate and power zones. Requires profile:read_all.
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using Strava;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Update Athlete
Examples.Description: Update the currently authenticated athlete. Requires profile:write scope.
Examples.Code:
### Update Athlete
# @name updateLoggedInAthlete
PUT {{host}}/athlete
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Profile information for the authenticated athlete.
# Content-Type: application/json
# default
# Description: Unexpected error.
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: List Club Activities
Examples.Description: Retrieve recent activities from members of a specific club. The authenticated athlete must belong to the requested club in order to hit this endpoint. Pagination is supported. Athlete profile visibility is respected for all activities.
Examples.Code:
### List Club Activities
# @name getClubActivitiesById
GET {{host}}/clubs/{{id}}/activities?page={{page}}&per_page=30
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: A list of activities.
# Content-Type: application/json
# default
# Description: Unexpected error.
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: List Club Administrators
Examples.Description: Returns a list of the administrators of a given club.
Examples.Code:
### List Club Administrators
# @name getClubAdminsById
GET {{host}}/clubs/{{id}}/admins?page={{page}}&per_page=30
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: A list of summary athlete representations.
# Content-Type: application/json
# default
# Description: Unexpected error.
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Get Club
Examples.Description: Returns a given a club using its identifier.
Examples.Code:
### Get Club
# @name getClubById
GET {{host}}/clubs/{{id}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: The detailed representation of a club.
# Content-Type: application/json
# default
# Description: Unexpected error.
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: List Club Members
Examples.Description: Returns a list of the athletes who are members of a given club.
Examples.Code:
### List Club Members
# @name getClubMembersById
GET {{host}}/clubs/{{id}}/members?page={{page}}&per_page=30
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: A list of club athlete representations.
# Content-Type: application/json
# default
# Description: Unexpected error.
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: List Athlete Clubs
Examples.Description: Returns a list of the clubs whose membership includes the authenticated athlete.
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using Strava;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Get Equipment
Examples.Description: Returns an equipment using its identifier.
Examples.Code:
### Get Equipment
# @name getGearById
GET {{host}}/gear/{{id}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: A representation of the gear.
# Content-Type: application/json
# default
# Description: Unexpected error.
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: List Segment Efforts
Examples.Description: Returns a set of the authenticated athlete's segment efforts for a given segment.  Requires subscription.
Examples.Code:
### List Segment Efforts
# @name getEffortsBySegmentId
GET {{host}}/segment_efforts?segment_id={{segment_id}}&start_date_local={{start_date_local}}&end_date_local={{end_date_local}}&per_page=30
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: List of segment efforts.
# Content-Type: application/json
# default
# Description: Unexpected error.
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Get Segment Effort
Examples.Description: Returns a segment effort from an activity that is owned by the authenticated athlete. Requires subscription.
Examples.Code:
### Get Segment Effort
# @name getSegmentEffortById
GET {{host}}/segment_efforts/{{id}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Representation of a segment effort.
# Content-Type: application/json
# default
# Description: Unexpected error.
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Explore segments
Examples.Description: Returns the top 10 segments matching a specified query.
Examples.Code:
### Explore segments
# @name exploreSegments
GET {{host}}/segments/explore?bounds={{bounds}}&activity_type=running&min_cat={{min_cat}}&max_cat={{max_cat}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: List of matching segments.
# Content-Type: application/json
# default
# Description: Unexpected error.
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: List Starred Segments
Examples.Description: List of the authenticated athlete's starred segments. Private segments are filtered out unless requested by a token with read_all scope.
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using Strava;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Get Segment
Examples.Description: Returns the specified segment. read_all scope required in order to retrieve athlete-specific segment information, or to retrieve private segments.
Examples.Code:
### Get Segment
# @name getSegmentById
GET {{host}}/segments/{{id}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Representation of a segment.
# Content-Type: application/json
# default
# Description: Unexpected error.
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Star Segment
Examples.Description: Stars/Unstars the given segment for the authenticated athlete. Requires profile:write scope.
Examples.Code:
### Star Segment
# @name starSegment
PUT {{host}}/segments/{{id}}/starred
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Representation of a segment.
# Content-Type: application/json
# default
# Description: Unexpected error.
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Get Activity Streams
Examples.Description: Returns the given activity's streams. Requires activity:read scope. Requires activity:read_all scope for Only Me activities.
Examples.Code:
### Get Activity Streams
# @name getActivityStreams
GET {{host}}/activities/{{id}}/streams?keys={{keys}}&key_by_type=true
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: The set of requested streams.
# Content-Type: application/json
# default
# Description: Unexpected error.
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Get Route Streams
Examples.Description: Returns the given route's streams. Requires read_all scope for private routes.
Examples.Code:
### Get Route Streams
# @name getRouteStreams
GET {{host}}/routes/{{id}}/streams
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: The set of requested streams.
# Content-Type: application/json
# default
# Description: Unexpected error.
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Get Segment Effort Streams
Examples.Description: Returns a set of streams for a segment effort completed by the authenticated athlete. Requires read_all scope.
Examples.Code:
### Get Segment Effort Streams
# @name getSegmentEffortStreams
GET {{host}}/segment_efforts/{{id}}/streams?keys={{keys}}&key_by_type=true
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: The set of requested streams.
# Content-Type: application/json
# default
# Description: Unexpected error.
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Code:

# @name getSegmentStreams
GET {{host}}/segments/{{id}}/streams?keys={{keys}}&key_by_type=true
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

## Responses
